seoTitle: Claymore vs Clear Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Claymore and Clear Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Claymore vs Clear Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Claymore and Clear Creek.
heading: Claymore vs Clear Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Claymore, New South Wales and Clear Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Claymore has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Clear Creek (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Claymore or Clear Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Claymore has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Clear Creek scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Claymore scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Clear Creek scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Claymore or Clear Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Claymore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
